name: Michael S.
review: The cut list was perfectly accurate. As a beginner, I was nervous about building the farmstand, but the step-by-step 3D diagrams made it foolproof. Highly recommend!

name: Sarah Jenkins
review: Instant download and exactly what I was looking for. Saved me days of trying to figure out the angles myself. The kids absolutely love their new playhouse.

name: David W.
review: Excellent woodworking plans! Very detailed and easy to follow. I appreciated the materials shopping list—it made my trip to Home Depot a breeze.

name: Emily R.
review: So happy with how my chicken coop turned out. The measurements were spot on in the PDF. Will definitely be buying more plans from this shop.

name: John Carmichael
review: Great quality plans. I've bought plans from other Etsy sellers before that were confusing, but ElesWoodDesigns does it right. Clear, concise, and bold diagrams.

name: Amanda P.
review: I built the modern Adirondack chair over the weekend. The instructions are incredibly well thought out. They even give tips on which screws to use.

name: Robert B.
review: Worth every penny. The project is finished and looks perfectly professional. The dimensions are perfect.

name: Chris T.
review: It was exactly as described on the listing. Very satisfied with the digital download. Customer service was also very quick when I asked a question about wood rot.

name: Lisa M.
review: My husband and I built this together! The step-by-step coloring made it really simple to understand what attaches where. Beautiful final result.

name: Thomas G.
review: Highly detailed format and super affordable. If you have a saw and a drill, these plans will guide you through the rest. Fantastic.
